sections.headline: I build projects that solve real problems
sections.description: A final-year Computer Science student focused on full-stack web development. I learn by building — here are the projects I'm most proud of.

sections.heading: Featured Projects
sections.subheading: The work I care about most — built end to end, deployed and used by real people.

items.title: TaskFlow — Team Todo App
items.desc: Full-stack app (React, Node, MongoDB) with auth, real-time updates and 200+ users. Deployed on Render.

items.title: CampusEats
items.desc: Food pre-order PWA for the college canteen — cut queue time by 40%. React + Firebase.

items.title: StudyBuddy AI
items.desc: Flashcard generator using the OpenAI API; hackathon finalist. Python + FastAPI + React.

items.title: DevPortfolio CLI
items.desc: Open-source tool that scaffolds a portfolio from a JSON file. 120★ on GitHub.

sections.heading: About me
paragraphs: I'm a final-year CS student who genuinely enjoys building software. Most of what I know came from shipping side projects, contributing to open source, and two internships where I worked on production code.
I'm looking for a full-time or internship role where I can keep learning from strong engineers and ship things that matter.
credentials: Open-source contributor — 150+ GitHub stars across projects
Comfortable across the full stack, strongest in React + Node

sections.heading: B.Tech, Computer Science
body: Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Web Technologies, Machine Learning.

sections.heading: Let's connect
sections.subheading: Open to internships and entry-level roles — reach out any time.

sections.heading: Looking for a developer intern who ships?
